items.slide_title: Edit your site right on the page
items.slide_description: The Visual Editor turns the frontend into the editing surface — click any Desiderio element and change it inline. Editors stop guessing what 'save' will look like.

slide_image.title: Editing in the Desiderio Visual Editor
slide_image.alternative: TYPO3 Visual Editor with inline editing of a Desiderio content element on the page.
slide_image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.

items.slide_title: A launch-ready frontend out of the box
items.slide_description: This is the seeded demo site on the Lagoon preset — not a mockup, a real TYPO3 frontend you get minutes after composer require.

slide_image.title: Desiderio frontend on the Lagoon preset
slide_image.alternative: Desiderio demo site hero page rendered in the light Lagoon theme preset.
slide_image.description: Frontend screenshot of a TYPO3 site built with Desiderio.

items.slide_description: OKLCH tokens give each of the 15 presets a matching dark scheme with WCAG 2.2-checked contrast — here's the pricing page on Midnight, no overrides involved.

slide_image.title: Desiderio pricing page in dark Midnight preset
slide_image.alternative: Desiderio demo pricing page rendered in the dark Midnight theme preset.
slide_image.description: Frontend screenshot of a TYPO3 site built with Desiderio.

items.slide_description: Every Desiderio Content Block renders a real preview in the page module, so editors recognise blocks at a glance — no gray placeholder boxes, ever.

slide_image.title: Desiderio page module previews
slide_image.alternative: TYPO3 page module showing Desiderio content elements with rendered backend previews.
slide_image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.

items.slide_title: Ten element groups in the wizard
items.slide_description: Hero, Features, Pricing, Data, Trust, Team, Navigation, Footers, Content, and Conversion — 255 elements, all one click away in the new-content wizard.

slide_image.title: Desiderio new content element wizard
slide_image.alternative: TYPO3 new content element wizard listing all ten Desiderio element groups.
slide_image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.

items.slide_title: Reskin the whole site from site settings
items.slide_description: Pick one of 15 shadcn presets, density, radius, and fonts in site settings — the entire frontend repaints at runtime. No build pipeline was harmed.

slide_image.title: Desiderio site settings theme category
slide_image.alternative: TYPO3 site settings module showing the Desiderio theme category with preset and typography options.
slide_image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.

items.slide_description: Any page subtree can run its own preset, inherited down the rootline. Campaign in Midnight, corporate site on Aurora, one installation.

slide_image.title: Desiderio per-page theme preset field
slide_image.alternative: TYPO3 page properties form showing the Desiderio theme preset selector for a single page.
slide_image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.

items.slide_description: Contact, booking, callback, and more ship as TYPO3 Form Framework definitions, with optional Friendly Captcha and Brevo double-opt-in finishers.

slide_image.title: Desiderio forms module
slide_image.alternative: TYPO3 forms module listing the eight form definitions bundled with Desiderio.
slide_image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.

items.slide_title: Dashboards your data team will envy
items.slide_description: 32 data and dashboard elements — charts, KPIs, tables — all token-themed, here on the Forest preset. Reports that match your brand without a single CSS line.

slide_image.title: Desiderio dashboards page on the Forest preset
slide_image.alternative: Desiderio demo dashboards page with charts rendered in the Forest theme preset.
slide_image.description: Frontend screenshot of a TYPO3 site built with Desiderio.
